name: Guitarricadelafuente
description:
'''Álvaro Lafuente Calvo''' (born 27 August 1997), known professionally as '''Guitarricadelafuente''', is a Spanish singer-songwriter and guitarist based in [[Barcelona]]. He began sharing cover versions of songs on social media platforms such as [[Instagram]] in 2017. His style, which blends elements of [[indie folk]], [[rumba]], and [[flamenco]], gradually attracted an audience.

In April 2018, Lafuente released his first original composition, "Conticinio", recorded at home with a [[PlayStation]] microphone. He subsequently published additional original material and embarked on a small tour in several Spanish cities. In June 2019, he collaborated with ''[[Operación Triunfo (Spanish TV series)|Operación Triunfo]]'' contestant [[Natalia Lacunza]] on her debut single, "Nana Triste", which reached number four on the [[Spanish Singles Chart|Spanish singles chart]]. Following this success, he continued to issue singles independently.
